statement.p: The boiling temperature of water depends on what the surrounding air pressure is. Scientists measured the boiling point of water under various amounts of pressure and plotted the results below. Then they added a line of best fit.
Write an equation for this line in slope-intercept form.

solution.p: Do your best to identify two points on the line.
Estimating the y-intercept to be at (0,90)\text{,} we have y=13.3x+90\text{.}
